# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

interface EdgeConfig {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG_ALPHA?: boolean;
}

const defaultConfig: EdgeConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAG_ALPHA: false, // Default for optional flag
};

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(req: Request) {
  let edgeConfig: EdgeConfig;

  if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG);
      const remoteConfig: Partial<EdgeConfig> = await response.json();

      edgeConfig = {
        ...defaultConfig,
        ...remoteConfig,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch Edge Config, falling back to defaults:', error);
      edgeConfig = defaultConfig;
    }
  } else {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    edgeConfig = defaultConfig;
  }

  const { API_KEY, DB_URL, FEATURE_FLAG_ALPHA } = edgeConfig;

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      message: 'Hello from Vercel Edge Function!',
      configuration: {
        API_KEY: API_KEY,
        DB_URL: DB_URL,
        FEATURE_FLAG_ALPHA: FEATURE_FLAG_ALPHA,
      },
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'Edge Config' : 'Defaults',
    }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
    },
  );
}
